title: Structural exploitation often persists not due to lack of laws, but due to lack of ethical commitment. Discuss its implications for institutional integrity.
description: Q7. Structural exploitation often persists not due to lack of laws, but due to lack of ethical commitment. Discuss its implications for institutional integrity. (10 M) Difficulty Level: Medium Reference: TH Why the question Persistent instances of exploitation despite strong legal frameworks highlight the gap between law and ethical governance.
